title: Siemens India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Siemens India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Siemens India Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Siemens India Ventures Solutions:
Siemens India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Ventures Solutions!
